text:
A young girl's Olympic dreams, aided by Tarzan (and her dad) - forSunday Miscellanyon RTÉ Radio 1, listen toOlympic Golds,by Mae Leonard above.

Johnny Weissmuller taught me how to swim.

I'm talking about Tarzan of the Apes, but I must give my father some credit too, he had a lot to do with it. After I had been rescued from drowning in the river beside our home in Limerick, dad set about teaching me how to swim...

Listen to more fromSunday Miscellanyhere.

title: Sunday Miscellany on a young girl's Olympic dreams
